01 / Introduction

What is
ArenaOne?

ArenaOne is a customer-facing gaming lounge app that allows users to book gaming sessions, order food, join tournaments, buy gaming merch and manga, earn rewards, and get help from an AI assistant.

The product is designed for one gaming cafe ecosystem first, with future expansion into a multi-cafe SaaS platform - making it not just an app, but a full operating system for gaming lounges.

UX Research
Product Design
Delhi-NCR
B2C App

"Gaming cafes are no longer just spaces with PCs and consoles. They are social hangout spaces, competitive arenas, community hubs, and product discovery spaces."

- Context Insight
16-25
Core age group
50+
Gamers researched
02 / Problem

The Fragmented
Cafe Experience

Gamers in Delhi-NCR face a fragmented gaming cafe experience where booking, food ordering, tournaments, rewards, and merchandise are handled through counters, staff, social media, or separate systems.

This causes waiting, confusion, gameplay interruptions, staff overload, and missed engagement opportunities across the entire lounge experience.

For Users
📵
No live availability - must ask staff or call
⏳
Manual booking dependency causes waiting
🎮
Food ordering interrupts active gameplay
🔄
Session extension requires staff intervention
🏆
Tournament updates scattered across social media
💎
Rewards and merch not integrated anywhere
Design Challenge

How might we design a simple and accessible digital platform that lets gamers manage their entire cafe experience without depending on counters, staff, or scattered communication channels?

03 / Research

How We
Understood Users

01
Observational Research
Real gaming cafe operational understanding, observing user behaviour inside cafe environments to capture natural patterns.
02
Stakeholder Interviews
Discussions with Indian gaming cafe owners to understand their operational pain points, peak-hour struggles, and digital readiness.
03
Competitive Research
Analysis across booking, food ordering, gaming, loyalty, and commerce apps to identify gaps and set benchmarks.
50+
Gamers planned for validation
10
Staff members interviewed
3
Cafe owners consulted
Research Goals
Session Booking Behaviour
How users currently book gaming sessions and what friction they face
Wait & Confusion Triggers
What causes waiting and confusion in the cafe environment
Food Ordering Impact
How food ordering affects the gaming flow and experience quality
Staff Overload Patterns
What staff struggles with during peak hours
Feature Desirability
What features gamers would actually use and pay for
Rewards Psychology
How rewards can increase repeat visits and loyalty
AI Assistance Value
Whether AI assistance can meaningfully improve the cafe experience
Community Engagement
How social features drive repeat visits and tournament participation

Empathy Map
💭 Thinks
"Is a system available?"
"I don't want to waste time waiting."
"I wish I could order without leaving my setup."
❤ Feels
Excited before playing, irritated by delays and wait times, motivated by visible rewards and upcoming events.
🗣 Says
"Can we extend one more hour?"
"Who will go order food?"
"When is the next tournament?"
🏃 Does
Calls cafes, asks staff, checks Instagram, uses WhatsApp groups for coordination, revisits when offers are clearly visible.
User Journey: Before vs After ArenaOne
❌ Current Journey (Painful)
Plans visit
Calls / walks in
Asks availability
Waits or chooses
Starts playing
Interrupted for food
Pays manually
Misses offers
✅ ArenaOne Journey (Seamless)
Opens app
Checks live availability
Books & pays
Starts session
Orders food in-seat
Extends from app
Earns points
Joins tournament
05 / Brief & Value

What ArenaOne
Delivers

Design a customer-facing gaming lounge platform that allows users to manage booking, food ordering, events, rewards, store access, community, and AI assistance from one unified app.

🎮
Book Faster
Live availability across PCs, PS5s, and Racing Simulators. No more calls, no more counters.
🍕
Order In-Seat
Full snacks, beverages, and combo menu delivered to your gaming station without pausing gameplay.
🏆
Join Tournaments
Weekly Valorant, monthly FC25, and more - all discoverable and registerable inside the app.
⭐
Earn & Level Up
Points for every session, food order, and tournament. Silver -> Gold -> Elite with unlocking perks.
🛒
Gaming Store
Gear, manga, and merch integrated in-app. HyperX, Razer, One Piece, Jujutsu Kaisen and more.
🤖
AI Concierge
ArenaBot powered by Claude AI for game strategies, tournament info, booking help, and store suggestions.
06 / Features + IA

What's Inside
ArenaOne

Core Features - MVP
Live Availability & Booking
Real-time PC, PS5, Racing Sim availability with date/time selection
Food & Drinks Ordering
Snacks, beverages, combos delivered directly to your station
Rewards Dashboard
Points, tier progress, redemption, and history tracking
ArenaBot AI
Claude-powered gaming concierge for help, tips, and guidance
Community Chat
General and game-specific channels for squad finding
ArenaOne Store
Gear, manga, and merch browsing and ordering
Tournaments & Events
Discovery, registration, and prize information
Notifications
Points earned, booking confirmed, tournament alerts

07 / User Flows

How Users
Move Through

Flow 01
Book a Session
1
Open App
Login or skip as guest
2
Select Category
PC / PS5 / Racing Simulator
3
Choose Date & Time
Select duration in hours
4
Payment
Pay now or at cafe
5
Confirmed + Points
Booking confirmed, points added
Flow 02
Order Food
1
Open Food & Drinks
Browse Snacks / Beverages / Combos
2
Add to Cart
Add items, review quantity
3
Select Payment
Choose payment method
4
Place Order
Processing -> Preparing -> On the way
5
Delivered to Station
Food arrives without interruption
Task Flow
ArenaBot AI
1
Open ArenaBot
Live / Claude AI
2
Select or Type
Suggested prompts or free query
3
Get Response
Game tips, tournament info, booking help
4
Take Action
Deep link to relevant section
5
Task Complete
Premium lounge assistant experience
08 / Wireframes

From Rough
to Refined

Lo-Fi
Structure First
Navigation structure, booking sequence, food ordering layout, cart pattern, rewards hierarchy, AI chat placement, and store browsing - all without visual style.
Mid-Fi
Content Placement
Real content placement, pricing visibility, session status, food categories, cart quantity controls, rewards tier progress, store filters, and confirmation states.
Hi-Fi
Final UI
Dark gaming interface with neon cyan highlights, glow effects, dark cards, sidebar navigation, progress bars, reward badges, and confirmation modals.

SaaS model - white-label for gaming lounges nationwide

13 / Conclusion

What We
Built

ArenaOne solves the gaming cafe experience as a complete journey, not just a booking problem.

It reduces counter dependency, improves accessibility, supports in-seat actions, builds repeat engagement through rewards, and creates a digital layer for gaming cafe operations.

The next step is to test the prototype with real gamers and staff, refine the flows, and prepare the admin portal for cafe operations.

Prototype Ready
32+ Screens
Full Flow Coverage
🎯
Problem Solved
Complete cafe journey digitized - booking, food, rewards, community, store, AI
📱
Platform Ready
MSP covers all core use cases for one cafe's full digital operations
🚀
Scale Path Clear
SaaS roadmap defined - multi-cafe expansion from v3 onwards
